description: Ranked AI provides SEO software and managed SEO/PPC services for businesses and agencies, including keyword tracking, AI visibility monitoring, audits, backlinks, content, and reporting. It also offers white-label workflows and a client portal for managing projects and performance data.
summary: Ranked AI exposes a REST API for SEO/project data, an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://app.ranked.ai/api/mcp/sse, and a TypeScript SDK package for the REST API.
